section_analysis.description: Quiet, rhythmic acoustic guitar. Focus on 'Atmospheric Summer' imagery.
Soaring melody. Focus on 'Transparent' world and longing. High emotional resonance.

lyrics.original: 本能が狂い始める 追い詰められたハツカネズミ
lyrics.romaji: Honnou ga kurui hajimeru oitsume rareta hatsukanezumi

lyrics.original: 透明な君は 僕を指差してた―。
lyrics.romaji: Toumei na kimi wa boku wo yubi sashiteta—.
lyrics.meta: Key revelation line. Accusatory ghost imagery.

stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Acoustic Guitar, Piano, Clean Electric Guitar
signature_phrases: 僕を指差してた (Pointing at me)
